lines.en: Doctor, I cannot see the board clearly at school.
lines.zh: 医生，我在学校看不清黑板。

lines.en: How long has this been happening?
About two weeks. My eyes feel tired.
lines.zh: 大约两周了。我的眼睛感觉累。

lines.en: Please sit here and cover your left eye.
Read the letters on the chart from top to bottom.
lines.zh: 从上到下读表上的字母。

lines.en: E, F, P, T, O, Z... I cannot see the last line.
lines.zh: E, F, P, T, O, Z... 最后一行看不清了。

lines.en: Now try with both eyes. Can you see better?
lines.zh: 现在两只眼睛一起看。好一些了吗？

lines.en: You need glasses. Do not read in the dark.
lines.zh: 你需要戴眼镜了。不要在暗处看书。
